title: AgentCard
description: ROAR Layer 2: Public-facing capability descriptor for an agent. Combines AgentIdentity with discovery metadata — skills, endpoints, and formal capability declarations. Referenced by AgentDirectory for registration and capability search.

identity.description: The agent's Layer 1 identity (DID, type, capabilities, version, optional public key).

description.description: Plain-English description of what this agent does. Shown to humans and used by other agents to decide whether to collaborate.
examples: Backend architect specializing in API design and database schemas
Code reviewer focused on security and performance

skills.description: Named skills this agent has installed. Strings match registered skill identifiers (e.g., 'code_review', 'api_design').

channels.description: Communication channels this agent is reachable on (e.g., 'console', 'discord', 'telegram').

endpoints.description: Transport endpoints keyed by protocol type ('http', 'ws', 'stdio', 'grpc'). Values are fully-qualified URLs or paths.

declared_capabilities.description: Formal capability declarations with input/output JSON schemas. Optional but enables capability-aware routing and validation.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this capability does.

input_schema.description: JSON Schema for the capability's input parameters.

output_schema.description: JSON Schema for the capability's output.

examples.name: code_review
examples.description: Review code for quality, security, and maintainability

metadata.description: Arbitrary key-value metadata. Use for team, timezone, owner, or any deployment-specific properties not covered by other fields.

attestation.description: Base64url-encoded Ed25519 signature over the canonical AgentCard JSON (excluding this field). Used for verifiable agent card registration. Null if the card is unsigned.

examples.description: Backend architect specializing in API design and database schemas

declared_capabilities.name: code_review
declared_capabilities.description: Review code for quality and security
